name: ping_federate
explanation: Despite the hint about Prometheus, the PingFederate tile in this repo is logs-only: the spec contains only a `logs` template (file tail of `<pf_install>/pingfederate/log/admin.log` and `audit.log`) and ships no Agent metric check beyond `__init__.py`. The README confirms there are no metrics, events, or service checks. The `<pf_install>` placeholder is per-deployment user input and the integration emits CEF logs only. There is no endpoint to probe.
notes: Logs-only tile (pattern N analogue). README explicitly states no metrics/events/service checks. The hint about a Prometheus endpoint does not match what the integration actually ships.
